creator: adox@mcx2.org
text:
i see atm the currently port on cvs is up to date. 1.5b i an beta

 taglib-1.5.tar.gz       21-Feb-2008 01:51
 taglib-1.5b1.tar.gz     04-Feb-2008 05:05

please use this patch for change a few things:

--- taglib_update.diff begins here ---
diff -ruN taglib.orig/Makefile taglib/Makefile
--- taglib.orig/Makefile        2008-09-23 21:34:20.000000000 +0200
+++ taglib/Makefile     2008-09-23 21:34:40.000000000 +0200
@@ -8,9 +8,10 @@
 PORTNAME=      taglib
 PORTVERSION=   1.5
 CATEGORIES=    audio
-MASTER_SITES=  http://ktown.kde.org/~wheeler/files/src/
+MASTER_SITES=  http://ktown.kde.org/~wheeler/files/src/ \
+                       http://mirror.mcx2.org/

-MAINTAINER=    ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=    adox@mcx2.org
 COMMENT=       Library for manipulating ID3 tags and Ogg comments

   USE_AUTOTOOLS= libtool:15
   @@ -23,4 +24,9 @@
           "s#\$$(libdir)/pkgconfig#${PREFIX}/libdata/pkgconfig#g" \
            ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.  ${WRKSRC}/bindings/c/Makefile.in

+post-install:
+               @${ECHO_MSG} ""
+               @${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
+               @${ECHO_MSG} ""
+
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
diff -ruN taglib.orig/pkg-message
taglib/pkg-message
--- taglib.orig/pkg-message     1970-01-01
01:00:00.000000000 +0100
+++ taglib/pkg-message  2008-09-23
20:52:18.000000000 +0200
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+###########################################################################
+taglib has been installed.
+
+For more information about taglib visit:
+http://developer.kde.org/~wheeler/taglib.html
+###########################################################################

--- taglib_update.diff ends here ---
